programme.title: MeatEater - Wild Game Master Class
programme.desc: In this episode, Steven Rinella steps out of the field and into the kitchen to showcase some of his favorite.

programme.title: MeatEater - Idaho Mountain Lion
programme.desc: Steve heads to the panhandle of Idaho to join wildlife biologist and dedicated houndsman Bart George for a mountain lion hunt. Bruce Dunkin, Bart's mentor and hunting buddy, joins the crew as they attempt to cut a cat's track and let the dogs loose for a hunt in the deep timber of the Idaho mountains.

programme.title: MeatEater - Southeast Alaska Blacktail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and Evan Hafer head into Southeast Alaska's coastal rainforest to hunt Sitka black-tailed deer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Nebraska Whitetails
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and Clay Newcomb head to Nebraska's Sandhills for a whitetail deer hunt, guided by Jordan.

programme.title: MeatEater - Louisiana Ducks
programme.desc: Steven Rinella joins Jean-Paul Bourgeois and Ronnie Collins in Louisiana‚ Mississippi Delta for a duck hunt. Surrounded by the unique landscape of the Delta, they target multiple duck species. After a successful hunt, the team returns to camp, where Jean-Paul prepares a traditional Cajun meal featuring the day‚ catch. Experience the cultural tradition of turning fresh game into flavorful, local dishes like duck gumbo and crawfish boil.

programme.title: MeatEater - Hawaii Hogs and Sheep
programme.desc: Steven Rinella, Ryan Callahan, and Danny Bolton travel to Hawaii's Big Island for a unique hunt. They stalk feral sheep in the lush mountainsides and target wild hogs on a coffee plantation, using the animals' movements through macadamia groves to their advantage. The episode highlights Hawaii's blend of hunting and conservation, ending with a Hawaiian-style feast featuring the fresh game they harvested.

programme.title: MeatEater - Hawaii Spearfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella teams up with spearfishing champions Danny Bolton and Kimi Werner.

programme.title: MeatEater - Alaska Moose
programme.desc: In this episode of MeatEater, Steven Rinella and Clay Newcomb head into Alaska's remote interior.

programme.title: MeatEater - Alaska Black Bear
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. On this hunt, Steve introduces Randall Williams and Clay Newcomb to his fish shack in Prince of Wales, Alaska where they fish for cod, set shrimp pots and hunt for black bears.

programme.title: MeatEater - Michigan Squirrels and Rabbits
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. Steve jets off to his home state of Michigan to hunt for small game with friends Guy Zuck and Kevin Murphy.

programme.title: MeatEater - Idaho Mule Deer
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful.

programme.title: MeatEater - Florida Osceola Turkey
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. On this hunt, Steve and Janis Putelis are in Florida with local, Richard Martinez, in search for the illusive Osceola Turkey.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bahamas Spearfishing
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. Steve heads down to the Bahamas to spearfish with friends Kimi Werner and Cameron Kirkconnell. They explore the clear waters of the North Atlantic to bring home a wide array of fish species, including Mahi Mahi and grouper.

programme.title: Lousiana Spearfishing and Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the coast of Louisiana to spearfish and bowfish with Ronnie Collins and Greg Fonts. With ideal conditions, Steve receives a last minute invitation from Ronnie to spearfish during the reintroduced spring Amberjack season. Afterwards, the crew stays up for a late evening of bowfishing for red drum.

programme.title: MeatEater - Montana Muzzleloader Hunting for Mule Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes on Montana’s week-long big game heritage season with a traditional muzzleloader. With flintlock in hand, Steve’s after mule deer in a desolate and broken sage brush landscape. After a long few months of evading hunters, these deer have perfected how to stay alive. But stalking a deer into range isn’t the only hurdle to navigate.

programme.title: En un mismo lugar
programme.desc: Drama

programme.title: Doble engaño
programme.desc: Drama

programme.title: La llegada de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa vuelve al edificio para visitar a los Vecinos y ponerse al corriente. Benito invita a su novia a "ver pelis" en el departamento, al enterarse de que sus papás saldrán.

programme.title: La cocina de Silvita
programme.desc: Como Luis le ha preparado el desayuno, Silvita se encargará de prepararle a su esposo un platillo espectacular.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: La cosas de Don Roque
programme.desc: Germán le entrega a Vanessa cosas que le dejó don Roque, por lo que ambos lo recuerdan y homenajean. Lorena aprecia a Soledad, la nueva amiga de Benito.

programme.title: El tamalero
programme.desc: Como el tamalero no deja dormir a Luis, este le pedirá que le baje a su bocina. Ve cuántos enemigos se echará encima, por dejar sin trabajo al tamalero.

programme.title: Los paramédicos
programme.desc: Por pedirle a Morris que ponga en su tarea que son paramédicos, Rocko y Ale deben ir a la escuela a dar un curso de primeros auxilios. Llegan nuevos vecinos al departamento 301.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: Los ex
programme.desc: Luis le pide a Silvita que deje de hablar con su ex, pues se siente incómodo, sin sospechar que Maru, ex de Luis, llegará a la puerta de su casa. Además, la obra de arte de Jorjais.

programme.title: El cumpleaños de Germán
programme.desc: Todos se olvidan del cumpleaños de Germán, a pesar de estar invitados a la fiesta. Lorena y Frankie le dicen a Benito que volverá a los castings.

programme.title: La amiga incómoda
programme.desc: La amiga de Silvita se queda en el departamento de los recién casados, ya que se ha quedado sin casa. Además, Magda trata de convencer a los vecinos para que acepten poner un anuncio en la fachada del edificio.

programme.title: El nuevo reglamento
programme.desc: Los Rivers solo tienen dinero para comer atún. Así que Frankie envía a Benito a hacer el casting para interpretar al Sol. Pero Luis propone realizar un nuevo reglamento de convivencia vecinal.

programme.title: La historia de Jorjáis
programme.desc: Jorjáis cuenta su verdadera historia, y hará llorar a más de uno. Mientras tanto, como Frankie y Lorena no están en casa, Benito y Liz aprovecharán para hacer algo en su ausencia.

programme.title: La cocina económica
programme.desc: Jorjáis deja su sillón en la entrada del edificio de los vecinos, pero en un momento de descuido, desaparece. Lorena abre una cocina económica.

programme.title: Una pareja real
programme.desc: Los Rivers abren la correspondencia de los López Pérez y se enteran de que les embargarán la lavadora. ¿Magdalena se atreverá a demandarlos?

programme.title: La bocinota
programme.desc: Una refaccionaria se instala en la accesoria del edificio. La inauguración causa molestia entre los vecinos. Rocko y Arturo aprovechan para conseguir chamba en el local.

programme.title: Bienvenido doctor
programme.desc: El doctor Rafael Rivas se muda al edificio y Magdalena no deja pasar la oportunidad para conseguir una consulta gratis abusando de la confianza del nuevo inquilino.

programme.title: Una de terror
programme.desc: Silvita trata de mantener limpios los pasillos del edificio, ya que Lorena y Magdalena sacaron todas sus macetas. Mientras Luis trabaja, Pedro y Cris verán una película.

programme.title: Matrimonio perfecto
programme.desc: Silvita le demostrará a su vieja amiga Caro que tiene un matrimonio perfecto con Luis. Además, Lorena culpa a Germán por no tener limpio el patio del edificio.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Frida
programme.desc: The most prominent female painter of Latin America, Frida Kahlo, is agonizing in her Coyoacán home.
